properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Before the stars were in the sky Before the earth was never framed Long before time had begun I knew your name I had a plan for who you'd be I would create you for my glory You would be precious in my sight You would be mine

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I have loved you with an everlasting love Before you knew my name I sought you I have brought you with my blood Throughout the centuries through all of history And through eternity above I will love you with an everlasting love

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There were times you would not lister And you choose to go astray As your father as your shepherd I led you back into the way When the storms were fierce I held you in the shelter of my arms I have kept you from all evil and all harm

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: For neither height, nor depth, nor angels, nor things present, nor things to come Could ever separate nothing can take away My everlasting love
